title: PumpkinFree
body:
![Wearing a pumpkin with absolute clear view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc5b07053e92569d9cbb2f5fbef91ee89ff1455b_0.webp)

Removes the pumpkin overlay for a clear, unobstructed view. Compatible with Minecraft 1.16.5 and newer. Purely visual without any gameplay changes. Lightweight, easy to install, and ideal for everyone.
